form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.6m finishing third behind Koprioro at Caen over 2450m in a 6-7yo race on March 16 at $8.90. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Kabala Quick at Caen over 2450m in a 6-7yo race on March 30 at $5.80. Sure to play a major role.

form.formComment: Good run 3.8L third behind Jasmine De Neuvy at Enghien over 2875m 7-11yo race on March 10. Was disqualified last start on March 31 at Vincennes over 2700m 7-11yo euro open. Ignore last outing and assess on its third two starts back; Prepared to forgive the last start mishap.
